description: High-frequency synthetic trade data for internal testing.

columns.name: transaction_id
columns.description: Primary key. Unique identifier for the full trade lifecycle (bid to sell).

columns.name: symbol
columns.description: The ticker symbol of the asset.

columns.name: bid_price
columns.description: The execution price at which the asset was purchased.

columns.name: bid_time
columns.description: Timestamp of the initial purchase order execution.

columns.name: sell_order_settle_time
columns.description: The final timestamp when the transaction was fully cleared and settled by the exchange.
columns.business_rule: Expected to be bid_time + 1s (trade) + delta (settlement delay).
